title: Post-onboarding feedback and engagement enhancements
description: Implemented comprehensive post-onboarding experience including feedback collection, community introductions, welcome emails, and profile completeness tracking

1_feedback_widget.name: Quick Feedback Widget
1_feedback_widget.description: Post-onboarding feedback collection with emoji and star rating options
key_features: Dual feedback modes: emoji (quick) and star rating (detailed)
Optional text feedback field
RLS security policies for user data protection
Toast notifications for user feedback

2_community_introduction.name: Community Introduction Prompt
2_community_introduction.description: Multi-modal introduction creation (text/audio/video) for user profiles
key_features: Tabbed interface for text, audio, and video introductions
Native browser media recording (60-second limit)
Supabase storage integration for media files
Real-time preview functionality
File upload to profile-images storage bucket

3_branded_welcome_email.name: DNA Branded Welcome Email
3_branded_welcome_email.description: Automated welcome email with personalized content and branding
key_features: DNA brand colors and styling
Personalized content with user's selected pillars
Completed onboarding steps summary
Call-to-action buttons for profile and dashboard
Community guidelines and support information
Responsive HTML email template
Automatic trigger on onboarding completion

4_profile_completeness.name: Profile Completeness & Engagement Score
4_profile_completeness.description: Dashboard widget showing profile completion progress and engagement metrics
key_features: 100-point scoring system across basic info (40pts), professional info (30pts), community engagement (30pts)
Automatic score calculation via database triggers
Visual progress bars for completeness and engagement
Quick action buttons for incomplete profile sections
Smart widget hiding when profile is complete (80%+) and engagement is good (70%+)
Direct navigation to profile editing

new_tables.name: onboarding_feedback
new_tables.purpose: Store user feedback about onboarding experience

profile_table_additions: intro_audio_url (TEXT) - URL to audio introduction file
intro_video_url (TEXT) - URL to video introduction file

database_functions.name: calculate_profile_completeness()
database_functions.purpose: Calculate user's profile completion score out of 100

database_functions.name: update_profile_completeness()
database_functions.purpose: Trigger function to update completeness score

user_flow.1_onboarding_completion: User completes main onboarding → welcome email sent → redirect to post-onboarding flow
user_flow.2_feedback_collection: User provides feedback about onboarding experience (emoji or star rating + optional text)
user_flow.3_community_introduction: User creates introduction (text/audio/video) visible to community and connections
user_flow.4_dashboard_guidance: Profile completeness widget guides user to complete remaining profile sections
user_flow.5_engagement_tracking: System tracks profile completeness and community engagement scores

routes_added: /post-onboarding - Post-onboarding flow with feedback and introduction steps
services_created: src/services/feedbackService.ts - Service for onboarding feedback operations

resend_api.setup: RESEND_API_KEY environment variable configured in Supabase

storage_buckets.profile-images: Used for intro audio/video file storage

configuration_notes.email_domain: Welcome emails sent from welcome@diasporanetwork.africa - domain must be verified in Resend
configuration_notes.media_recording: Browser-based recording with 60-second limit for audio/video introductions
configuration_notes.completeness_scoring: 100-point system: Basic info (40), Professional (30), Community engagement (30)
configuration_notes.widget_visibility: Profile completeness widget auto-hides when score ≥80% and engagement ≥70%
configuration_notes.rls_security: All new tables include Row Level Security policies for data protection

next_steps: Test welcome email delivery and formatting
Verify media recording functionality across browsers
Collect user feedback on post-onboarding experience
Consider adding notification for incomplete profiles after 7 days
